revision.comment: Changing redirect for consistency with other date templates
revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Template:FULLDATE]]
{{#time:j F Y "(UTC)"}}
{{<includeonly>{{{subst|}}}</includeonly>#time:j F Y "(UTC)"}}
{{<includeonly>{{{subst|}}}</includeonly>#time:j F Y}}

{{<includeonly>{{{subst|}}}</includeonly>#time:j F Y}}<noinclude> ==Usage== {{tlx|date}} gives {{date}}, but this changes to tomorrow's date when you view it tomorrow, and so on.
{{tlsx|date|2=subst=subst:}} gives the date on which the template is used, and doesn't change.
[[Category:Date-computing templates based on current time|{{PAGENAME}}]] </noinclude>
{{<includeonly>{{{subst|}}}</includeonly>#time:j F Y}}<noinclude>

{{<includeonly>{{{subst|}}}</includeonly>#time:j F Y}}<noinclude> ==Usage== {{tlx|date}} gives {{date}}, but this changes to tomorrow's date when you view it tomorrow, and so on.
{{tlsx|date|2=subst=subst:}} gives the date on which the template is used, and doesn't change.
[[Category:Date-computing templates based on current time|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[es:Plantilla:Fecha]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: adds parsings of two MOS formats so its possible to write this as input
Defaults to not wikilinked. Needs to give the parameter 2 as y to get it wikilinked. Per MOS dates should not be wikilinked in most cases
Change the order, Wikilinked will normaly not be used so it should be the last parameter
why wouldn't we want it to accept all the date formats it can handle?
this was from the Norwegian version... any guesses??
restore ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:F j, Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:j F Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}}). It shouldnt be allowed to give dates outside MOS. Restored bday, See H-card
revision.text: {{#if: ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:F j, Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:j F Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}}) | {{#iferror:{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }} |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{#time:U|{{{1}}} }} | 0 |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{{3| }}}|y |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] | ymd | iso = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]] | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] }} |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} | ymd | iso = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }} | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }} }} }} }} }}({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}) |{{{1}}} }}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Only return hcard if valid date
revision.text: {{#if: ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:F j, Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:j F Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}}) | {{#iferror:{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }} |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{#time:U|{{{1}}} }} | 0 |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{{3| }}}|y |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] | ymd | iso = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]] | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] }} |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} | ymd | iso = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }} | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }} }} }}({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}) }} }} |{{{1}}} }}{{documentation}}

<onlyinclude><!--

< -- TEST IF DATE IS CORRUPT OR OUT OF RANGE -- >
-->{{#iferror: {{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} {{#iferror:{{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} 1999}}||*ERROR*}} 
 |{{{1|}}}
 |{{#ifeq: {{{3|}}}|y
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
   | mdy            = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   | iso | ymd      = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]]
   | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   }}
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
    | mdy            = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} 
    | iso | ymd      = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }}
    | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }}
   }}
  }}  
}}</onlyinclude>
{{documentation}}

<onlyinclude><!--

< -- TEST IF DATE IS CORRUPT OR OUT OF RANGE -- >
-->{{#iferror: {{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} {{#iferror:{{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} 1999}}||*ERROR*}} }}
 |{{{1|}}}
 |{{#ifeq: {{{3|}}}|y
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
   | mdy            = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   | iso | ymd      = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]]
   | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   }}
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
    | mdy            = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} 
    | iso | ymd      = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }}
    | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }}
   }}
  }}  
}}</onlyinclude>
{{documentation}}

<onlyinclude><!--

< -- TEST IF DATE IS CORRUPT OR A FRAGMENT -- >
-->{{#ifeq:{{#time:Y_M_d|{{{1}}} 2037}} | {{#iferror: {{#time:Y_M_d|{{{1}}} }} | *ERROR* }}
 |{{#ifeq: {{{3|}}}|y
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
    | asis | none    = {{{1|}}}
    | mdy            = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
    | iso | ymd      = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]]
    | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   }}
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
    | asis | none    = {{{1|}}}
    | mdy            = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} 
    | iso | ymd      = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }}
    | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }}
   }}
  }}  
 |{{{1|}}}

revision.comment: if no first parameter, use current date thanks to #time defaults
update after exhaustive development at [[User:Fullstop/Sandbox/T1]] and [[User:Happy-melon/sandbox1]]
revision.text:
<onlyinclude><!--
-->{{#switch:none
 |{{#iferror: {{#time:Y_M_d|{{{1|}}} }}|none}}
 |{{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}|none|asis=none}}
 |{{#ifexpr: {{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} }} < 1582|none}}<!--
--> = {{{1|}}}<!-- error or "none", so no formatting -->
 |<!-- continue with formatting -->
  {{#iferror: {{#expr:{{{1|dummy}}} }}
  |<!-- input is not just a solitary number -->
    {{#ifeq:{{#time:Y|{{{1|1 Jan 2000}}} 1996}}{{#time:Y|{{{1|1 Jan 2000}}} 2004}}|19962004
    |<!-- no year -->
      {{#ifeq:{{#time:d|{{{1|}}} 2036}}|{{#time:d|{{{1|}}} }}
      |<!-- month+day -->{{#time:
        {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
        | lmdy | liso | lymd      = [[:F j]]
        | mdy  | iso  | ymd       = F j
        | ldmy | l                = [[:j F]]
        | #default                = j F
        }}|{{{1|}}} 2000 }}<!-- default='dmy' or null or "" or unsupported option -->
      |<!-- month only -->{{#time:
        {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
        | lmdy | liso | lymd 
        | ldmy | l                = [[F]]
        | #default                = F
        }}|{{{1|}}} 2000 }}<!-- default='dmy'/'mdy'/'ymd'/'iso'/null/""/unsupported opt -->
      }}
    |<!-- with year-->
      {{#if: {{#iferror:{{#time:j|2 {{{1|}}}}}|*D*|{{#iferror:{{#time:j|2000 {{{1|}}}}}|*D*| }}}}
      |<!-- day+month+year -->{{#time:
        {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
        | lmdy                    = [[:F j]], [[Y]]
        | mdy                     = F j, Y
        | liso                    = [[Y|Y-]][[F j|m-d]]<!-- i.e. [[Y-m-d]] -->
        | iso                     = Y-m-d
        | lymd                    = [[Y]] [[:F j]]
        | ymd                     = Y F j
        | ldmy | l                = [[:j F]] [[Y]]
        | #default                = j F Y
        }}|{{{1|}}} }}<!-- #default='dmy' or null or "" or unsupported option -->
      |<!-- month+year -->{{#time:
        {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
        | lmdy | liso | lymd | ldmy | l  = [[:F Y]]
        | #default                = F Y
        }}|{{{1|}}} }}<!-- default='dmy'/'iso'/'mdy'/null/""/unsupported option -->
      }}
    }}
  |<!-- input is a solitary number. Treat it as just a year. -->
    {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
    | lmdy | liso | lymd 
    | ldmy | l                = [[{{#expr:{{{1|}}} }}]]
    | #default                = {{#expr:{{{1|}}} }}
    }}
  }}    
}}</onlyinclude>

revision.comment: improved method of excluding bad dates from 1000-1583 era
update to improve handling of pure-number inputs, per talk
TFM: Nominated For Merging, See [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion#Template:Today]]
add option lnone to link years, decades, centuries & days of the week see [[Wikipedia talk:Manual of Style/Dates and numbers#Delinking dates]]
Moved sandbox live to fix wrong output when substituted

{{<includeonly>{{{subst|}}}</includeonly>#time:j F Y}}

{{<includeonly>{{{subst|}}}</includeonly>#time:j F Y}}<noinclude> ==Usage== {{tlx|date}} gives {{date}}, but this changes to tomorrow's date when you view it tomorrow, and so on.
{{tlsx|date|2=subst=subst:}} gives the date on which the template is used, and doesn't change.
[[Category:Date-computing templates based on current time|{{PAGENAME}}]] </noinclude>
{{<includeonly>{{{subst|}}}</includeonly>#time:j F Y}}<noinclude>

{{tlsx|date|2=subst=subst:}} gives the date on which the template is used, and doesn't change.
[[Category:Date-computing templates based on current time|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[es:Plantilla:Fecha]] </noinclude>

MMMM YYYY'' som er [[de facto]]-standard på norskspråklig Wikipedia, se [[Wikipedia:Stilmanual#Datoer]] (og anbefalt av [http://www.sprakrad.no/Raad/Skriveregler_og_grammatikk/Dato/#dato Språkrådet]). *Parameter 2 settes til n om du ikke ønsker å wikifisere datoen. {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2007-01-24}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2006-05-04|n}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2006-5-4|n}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2006-5-04|n}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2006-05-4|n}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|May 4th, 2006|n}} ===Datostrenger som #time-.funksjonen ikke klarer å tolke returnerer bare strengen === {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|23007-031-24}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|1 desember 2008}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|[[1. desember]] [[2008]]}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|1 desember 2006}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|[[1. desember]] [[2006]]}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|24. DMY || MDY |- | {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2007-01-24}} || {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2007-01-24|y|mdy}} |- | {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2006-05-04|n}} || {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2006-05-04|n|mdy}} |- | {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2006-5-4|n}} || {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2006-5-4|n|mdy}} |- | {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2006-5-04|n}} || {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2006-5-04|n|mdy}} |- | {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2006-05-4|n}} || {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2006-05-4|n|mdy}} |- | {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|May 4th, 2006|n}} || {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|May 4th, 2006|n|mdy}} |} ===Date strings #time function doesn't interpretes returns only the string === {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|23007-031-24}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|1 December 2008}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|[[1 December]] [[2008]]}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|1 December 2006}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|[[1 December]] [[2006]]}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|24 June, 2006}} BUG {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|24 june 2006|n}} BUG ;outside the [[:meta:ParserFunctions#.23time:|#time]] functions limits {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|1901-12-13}}, {{#time:c|1901-12-13}} gives {{#time:c|1901-12-13}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|1901-12-14}}, {{#time:c|1901-12-14}} gives {{#time:c|1901-12-14}} (#time er riv ruskende gal, justert for i mal for alle disse tilfellene) {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|1970-01-01}}, {{#time:c|1970-01-01}} gives {{#time:c|1970-01-01}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|1970-01-02}} (riktig, første dato innenfor), {{#time:c|1970-01-02}} gives {{#time:c|1970-01-02}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2038-01-19}} (riktig, siste dato innenfor), {{#time:c|2038-01-19}} gives {{#time:c|2038-01-19}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2038-01-20}}, {{#time:c|2038-01-20}} gives {{#time:c|2038-01-20}} [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:ISO date templates]] [[no:Mal:ISOtilNorskdato]]

revision.comment: adds parsings of two MOS formats so its possible to write this as input
Defaults to not wikilinked. Needs to give the parameter 2 as y to get it wikilinked. Per MOS dates should not be wikilinked in most cases
Change the order, Wikilinked will normaly not be used so it should be the last parameter
why wouldn't we want it to accept all the date formats it can handle?
this was from the Norwegian version... any guesses??
restore ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:F j, Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:j F Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}}). It shouldnt be allowed to give dates outside MOS. Restored bday, See H-card
revision.text: {{#if: ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:F j, Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:j F Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}}) | {{#iferror:{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }} |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{#time:U|{{{1}}} }} | 0 |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{{3| }}}|y |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] | ymd | iso = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]] | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] }} |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} | ymd | iso = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }} | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }} }} }} }} }}({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}) |{{{1}}} }}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Only return hcard if valid date
revision.text: {{#if: ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:F j, Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:j F Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}}) | {{#iferror:{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }} |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{#time:U|{{{1}}} }} | 0 |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{{3| }}}|y |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] | ymd | iso = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]] | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] }} |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} | ymd | iso = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }} | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }} }} }}({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}) }} }} |{{{1}}} }}{{documentation}}

<onlyinclude><!--

< -- TEST IF DATE IS CORRUPT OR OUT OF RANGE -- >
-->{{#iferror: {{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} {{#iferror:{{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} 1999}}||*ERROR*}} 
 |{{{1|}}}
 |{{#ifeq: {{{3|}}}|y
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
   | mdy            = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   | iso | ymd      = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]]
   | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   }}
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
    | mdy            = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} 
    | iso | ymd      = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }}
    | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }}
   }}
  }}  
}}</onlyinclude>
{{documentation}}

<onlyinclude><!--

< -- TEST IF DATE IS CORRUPT OR OUT OF RANGE -- >
-->{{#iferror: {{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} {{#iferror:{{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} 1999}}||*ERROR*}} }}
 |{{{1|}}}
 |{{#ifeq: {{{3|}}}|y
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
   | mdy            = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   | iso | ymd      = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]]
   | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   }}
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
    | mdy            = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} 
    | iso | ymd      = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }}
    | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }}
   }}
  }}  
}}</onlyinclude>
{{documentation}}

<onlyinclude><!--

< -- TEST IF DATE IS CORRUPT OR A FRAGMENT -- >
-->{{#ifeq:{{#time:Y_M_d|{{{1}}} 2037}} | {{#iferror: {{#time:Y_M_d|{{{1}}} }} | *ERROR* }}
 |{{#ifeq: {{{3|}}}|y
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
    | asis | none    = {{{1|}}}
    | mdy            = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
    | iso | ymd      = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]]
    | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   }}
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
    | asis | none    = {{{1|}}}
    | mdy            = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} 
    | iso | ymd      = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }}
    | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }}
   }}
  }}  
 |{{{1|}}}
}}</onlyinclude>
{{documentation}}

revision.comment: if no first parameter, use current date thanks to #time defaults
update after exhaustive development at [[User:Fullstop/Sandbox/T1]] and [[User:Happy-melon/sandbox1]]
revision.text:
<onlyinclude><!--
-->{{#switch:none
 |{{#iferror: {{#time:Y_M_d|{{{1|}}} }}|none}}
 |{{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}|none|asis=none}}
 |{{#ifexpr: {{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} }} < 1582|none}}<!--
--> = {{{1|}}}<!-- error or "none", so no formatting -->
 |<!-- continue with formatting -->
  {{#iferror: {{#expr:{{{1|dummy}}} }}
  |<!-- input is not just a solitary number -->
    {{#ifeq:{{#time:Y|{{{1|1 Jan 2000}}} 1996}}{{#time:Y|{{{1|1 Jan 2000}}} 2004}}|19962004
    |<!-- no year -->
      {{#ifeq:{{#time:d|{{{1|}}} 2036}}|{{#time:d|{{{1|}}} }}
      |<!-- month+day -->{{#time:
        {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
        | lmdy | liso | lymd      = [[:F j]]
        | mdy  | iso  | ymd       = F j
        | ldmy | l                = [[:j F]]
        | #default                = j F
        }}|{{{1|}}} 2000 }}<!-- default='dmy' or null or "" or unsupported option -->
      |<!-- month only -->{{#time:
        {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
        | lmdy | liso | lymd 
        | ldmy | l                = [[F]]
        | #default                = F
        }}|{{{1|}}} 2000 }}<!-- default='dmy'/'mdy'/'ymd'/'iso'/null/""/unsupported opt -->
      }}
    |<!-- with year-->
      {{#if: {{#iferror:{{#time:j|2 {{{1|}}}}}|*D*|{{#iferror:{{#time:j|2000 {{{1|}}}}}|*D*| }}}}
      |<!-- day+month+year -->{{#time:
        {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
        | lmdy                    = [[:F j]], [[Y]]
        | mdy                     = F j, Y
        | liso                    = [[Y|Y-]][[F j|m-d]]<!-- i.e. [[Y-m-d]] -->
        | iso                     = Y-m-d
        | lymd                    = [[Y]] [[:F j]]
        | ymd                     = Y F j
        | ldmy | l                = [[:j F]] [[Y]]
        | #default                = j F Y
        }}|{{{1|}}} }}<!-- #default='dmy' or null or "" or unsupported option -->
      |<!-- month+year -->{{#time:
        {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
        | lmdy | liso | lymd | ldmy | l  = [[:F Y]]
        | #default                = F Y
        }}|{{{1|}}} }}<!-- default='dmy'/'iso'/'mdy'/null/""/unsupported option -->
      }}
    }}
  |<!-- input is a solitary number. Treat it as just a year. -->
    {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
    | lmdy | liso | lymd 
    | ldmy | l                = [[{{#expr:{{{1|}}} }}]]
    | #default                = {{#expr:{{{1|}}} }}
    }}
  }}    
}}</onlyinclude>

revision.comment: adds parsings of two MOS formats so its possible to write this as input
Defaults to not wikilinked. Needs to give the parameter 2 as y to get it wikilinked. Per MOS dates should not be wikilinked in most cases
Change the order, Wikilinked will normaly not be used so it should be the last parameter
why wouldn't we want it to accept all the date formats it can handle?
this was from the Norwegian version... any guesses??
restore ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:F j, Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:j F Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}}). It shouldnt be allowed to give dates outside MOS. Restored bday, See H-card
revision.text: {{#if: ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:F j, Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:j F Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}}) | {{#iferror:{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }} |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{#time:U|{{{1}}} }} | 0 |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{{3| }}}|y |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] | ymd | iso = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]] | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] }} |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} | ymd | iso = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }} | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }} }} }} }} }}({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}) |{{{1}}} }}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Only return hcard if valid date
revision.text: {{#if: ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:F j, Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:j F Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}}) | {{#iferror:{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }} |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{#time:U|{{{1}}} }} | 0 |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{{3| }}}|y |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] | ymd | iso = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]] | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] }} |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} | ymd | iso = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }} | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }} }} }}({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}) }} }} |{{{1}}} }}{{documentation}}

<onlyinclude><!--

< -- TEST IF DATE IS CORRUPT OR OUT OF RANGE -- >
-->{{#iferror: {{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} {{#iferror:{{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} 1999}}||*ERROR*}} 
 |{{{1|}}}
 |{{#ifeq: {{{3|}}}|y
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
   | mdy            = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   | iso | ymd      = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]]
   | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   }}
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
    | mdy            = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} 
    | iso | ymd      = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }}
    | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }}
   }}
  }}  
}}</onlyinclude>
{{documentation}}

<onlyinclude><!--

< -- TEST IF DATE IS CORRUPT OR OUT OF RANGE -- >
-->{{#iferror: {{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} {{#iferror:{{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} 1999}}||*ERROR*}} }}
 |{{{1|}}}
 |{{#ifeq: {{{3|}}}|y
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
   | mdy            = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   | iso | ymd      = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]]
   | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   }}
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
    | mdy            = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} 
    | iso | ymd      = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }}
    | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }}
   }}
  }}  
}}</onlyinclude>
{{documentation}}

<onlyinclude><!--

< -- TEST IF DATE IS CORRUPT OR A FRAGMENT -- >
-->{{#ifeq:{{#time:Y_M_d|{{{1}}} 2037}} | {{#iferror: {{#time:Y_M_d|{{{1}}} }} | *ERROR* }}
 |{{#ifeq: {{{3|}}}|y
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
    | asis | none    = {{{1|}}}
    | mdy            = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
    | iso | ymd      = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]]
    | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   }}
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
    | asis | none    = {{{1|}}}
    | mdy            = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} 
    | iso | ymd      = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }}
    | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }}
   }}
  }}  
 |{{{1|}}}
}}</onlyinclude>
{{documentation}}

revision.comment: if no first parameter, use current date thanks to #time defaults
update after exhaustive development at [[User:Fullstop/Sandbox/T1]] and [[User:Happy-melon/sandbox1]]
revision.text:
<onlyinclude><!--
-->{{#switch:none
 |{{#iferror: {{#time:Y_M_d|{{{1|}}} }}|none}}
 |{{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}|none|asis=none}}
 |{{#ifexpr: {{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} }} < 1582|none}}<!--
--> = {{{1|}}}<!-- error or "none", so no formatting -->
 |<!-- continue with formatting -->
  {{#iferror: {{#expr:{{{1|dummy}}} }}
  |<!-- input is not just a solitary number -->
    {{#ifeq:{{#time:Y|{{{1|1 Jan 2000}}} 1996}}{{#time:Y|{{{1|1 Jan 2000}}} 2004}}|19962004
    |<!-- no year -->
      {{#ifeq:{{#time:d|{{{1|}}} 2036}}|{{#time:d|{{{1|}}} }}
      |<!-- month+day -->{{#time:
        {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
        | lmdy | liso | lymd      = [[:F j]]
        | mdy  | iso  | ymd       = F j
        | ldmy | l                = [[:j F]]
        | #default                = j F
        }}|{{{1|}}} 2000 }}<!-- default='dmy' or null or "" or unsupported option -->
      |<!-- month only -->{{#time:
        {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
        | lmdy | liso | lymd 
        | ldmy | l                = [[F]]
        | #default                = F
        }}|{{{1|}}} 2000 }}<!-- default='dmy'/'mdy'/'ymd'/'iso'/null/""/unsupported opt -->
      }}
    |<!-- with year-->
      {{#if: {{#iferror:{{#time:j|2 {{{1|}}}}}|*D*|{{#iferror:{{#time:j|2000 {{{1|}}}}}|*D*| }}}}
      |<!-- day+month+year -->{{#time:
        {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
        | lmdy                    = [[:F j]], [[Y]]
        | mdy                     = F j, Y
        | liso                    = [[Y|Y-]][[F j|m-d]]<!-- i.e. [[Y-m-d]] -->
        | iso                     = Y-m-d
        | lymd                    = [[Y]] [[:F j]]
        | ymd                     = Y F j
        | ldmy | l                = [[:j F]] [[Y]]
        | #default                = j F Y
        }}|{{{1|}}} }}<!-- #default='dmy' or null or "" or unsupported option -->
      |<!-- month+year -->{{#time:
        {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
        | lmdy | liso | lymd | ldmy | l  = [[:F Y]]
        | #default                = F Y
        }}|{{{1|}}} }}<!-- default='dmy'/'iso'/'mdy'/null/""/unsupported option -->
      }}
    }}
  |<!-- input is a solitary number. Treat it as just a year. -->
    {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
    | lmdy | liso | lymd 
    | ldmy | l                = [[{{#expr:{{{1|}}} }}]]
    | #default                = {{#expr:{{{1|}}} }}
    }}
  }}    
}}</onlyinclude>

revision.comment: adds parsings of two MOS formats so its possible to write this as input
Defaults to not wikilinked. Needs to give the parameter 2 as y to get it wikilinked. Per MOS dates should not be wikilinked in most cases
Change the order, Wikilinked will normaly not be used so it should be the last parameter
why wouldn't we want it to accept all the date formats it can handle?
this was from the Norwegian version... any guesses??
restore ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:F j, Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:j F Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}}). It shouldnt be allowed to give dates outside MOS. Restored bday, See H-card
revision.text: {{#if: ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:F j, Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:j F Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}}) | {{#iferror:{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }} |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{#time:U|{{{1}}} }} | 0 |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{{3| }}}|y |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] | ymd | iso = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]] | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] }} |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} | ymd | iso = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }} | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }} }} }} }} }}({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}) |{{{1}}} }}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Only return hcard if valid date
revision.text: {{#if: ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:F j, Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:j F Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}}) | {{#iferror:{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }} |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{#time:U|{{{1}}} }} | 0 |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{{3| }}}|y |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] | ymd | iso = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]] | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] }} |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} | ymd | iso = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }} | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }} }} }}({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}) }} }} |{{{1}}} }}{{documentation}}

<onlyinclude><!--

< -- TEST IF DATE IS CORRUPT OR OUT OF RANGE -- >
-->{{#iferror: {{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} {{#iferror:{{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} 1999}}||*ERROR*}} 
 |{{{1|}}}
 |{{#ifeq: {{{3|}}}|y
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
   | mdy            = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   | iso | ymd      = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]]
   | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   }}
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
    | mdy            = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} 
    | iso | ymd      = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }}
    | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }}
   }}
  }}  
}}</onlyinclude>
{{documentation}}

<onlyinclude><!--

< -- TEST IF DATE IS CORRUPT OR OUT OF RANGE -- >
-->{{#iferror: {{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} {{#iferror:{{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} 1999}}||*ERROR*}} }}
 |{{{1|}}}
 |{{#ifeq: {{{3|}}}|y
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
   | mdy            = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   | iso | ymd      = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]]
   | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   }}
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
    | mdy            = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} 
    | iso | ymd      = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }}
    | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }}
   }}
  }}  
}}</onlyinclude>
{{documentation}}

<onlyinclude><!--

< -- TEST IF DATE IS CORRUPT OR A FRAGMENT -- >
-->{{#ifeq:{{#time:Y_M_d|{{{1}}} 2037}} | {{#iferror: {{#time:Y_M_d|{{{1}}} }} | *ERROR* }}
 |{{#ifeq: {{{3|}}}|y
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
    | asis | none    = {{{1|}}}
    | mdy            = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
    | iso | ymd      = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]]
    | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   }}
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
    | asis | none    = {{{1|}}}
    | mdy            = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} 
    | iso | ymd      = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }}
    | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }}
   }}
  }}  
 |{{{1|}}}
}}</onlyinclude>
{{documentation}}

revision.comment: if no first parameter, use current date thanks to #time defaults
update after exhaustive development at [[User:Fullstop/Sandbox/T1]] and [[User:Happy-melon/sandbox1]]
revision.text:
<onlyinclude><!--
-->{{#switch:none
 |{{#iferror: {{#time:Y_M_d|{{{1|}}} }}|none}}
 |{{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}|none|asis=none}}
 |{{#ifexpr: {{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} }} < 1582|none}}<!--
--> = {{{1|}}}<!-- error or "none", so no formatting -->
 |<!-- continue with formatting -->
  {{#iferror: {{#expr:{{{1|dummy}}} }}
  |<!-- input is not just a solitary number -->
    {{#ifeq:{{#time:Y|{{{1|1 Jan 2000}}} 1996}}{{#time:Y|{{{1|1 Jan 2000}}} 2004}}|19962004
    |<!-- no year -->
      {{#ifeq:{{#time:d|{{{1|}}} 2036}}|{{#time:d|{{{1|}}} }}
      |<!-- month+day -->{{#time:
        {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
        | lmdy | liso | lymd      = [[:F j]]
        | mdy  | iso  | ymd       = F j
        | ldmy | l                = [[:j F]]
        | #default                = j F
        }}|{{{1|}}} 2000 }}<!-- default='dmy' or null or "" or unsupported option -->
      |<!-- month only -->{{#time:
        {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
        | lmdy | liso | lymd 
        | ldmy | l                = [[F]]
        | #default                = F
        }}|{{{1|}}} 2000 }}<!-- default='dmy'/'mdy'/'ymd'/'iso'/null/""/unsupported opt -->
      }}
    |<!-- with year-->
      {{#if: {{#iferror:{{#time:j|2 {{{1|}}}}}|*D*|{{#iferror:{{#time:j|2000 {{{1|}}}}}|*D*| }}}}
      |<!-- day+month+year -->{{#time:
        {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
        | lmdy                    = [[:F j]], [[Y]]
        | mdy                     = F j, Y
        | liso                    = [[Y|Y-]][[F j|m-d]]<!-- i.e. [[Y-m-d]] -->
        | iso                     = Y-m-d
        | lymd                    = [[Y]] [[:F j]]
        | ymd                     = Y F j
        | ldmy | l                = [[:j F]] [[Y]]
        | #default                = j F Y
        }}|{{{1|}}} }}<!-- #default='dmy' or null or "" or unsupported option -->
      |<!-- month+year -->{{#time:
        {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
        | lmdy | liso | lymd | ldmy | l  = [[:F Y]]
        | #default                = F Y
        }}|{{{1|}}} }}<!-- default='dmy'/'iso'/'mdy'/null/""/unsupported option -->
      }}
    }}
  |<!-- input is a solitary number. Treat it as just a year. -->
    {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
    | lmdy | liso | lymd 
    | ldmy | l                = [[{{#expr:{{{1|}}} }}]]
    | #default                = {{#expr:{{{1|}}} }}
    }}
  }}    
}}</onlyinclude>

revision.comment: improved method of excluding bad dates from 1000-1583 era
update to improve handling of pure-number inputs, per talk
TFM: Nominated For Merging, See [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion#Template:Today]]
add option lnone to link years, decades, centuries & days of the week see [[Wikipedia talk:Manual of Style/Dates and numbers#Delinking dates]]

Changed protection level of Template:Date: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
Moved sandbox live to fix wrong output when substituted

revision.comment: adds parsings of two MOS formats so its possible to write this as input
Defaults to not wikilinked. Needs to give the parameter 2 as y to get it wikilinked. Per MOS dates should not be wikilinked in most cases
Change the order, Wikilinked will normaly not be used so it should be the last parameter
why wouldn't we want it to accept all the date formats it can handle?
this was from the Norwegian version... any guesses??
restore ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:F j, Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:j F Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}}). It shouldnt be allowed to give dates outside MOS. Restored bday, See H-card
revision.text: {{#if: ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:F j, Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:j F Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}}) | {{#iferror:{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }} |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{#time:U|{{{1}}} }} | 0 |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{{3| }}}|y |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] | ymd | iso = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]] | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] }} |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} | ymd | iso = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }} | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }} }} }} }} }}({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}) |{{{1}}} }}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Only return hcard if valid date
revision.text: {{#if: ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:F j, Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:j F Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}}) | {{#iferror:{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }} |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{#time:U|{{{1}}} }} | 0 |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{{3| }}}|y |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] | ymd | iso = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]] | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] }} |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} | ymd | iso = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }} | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }} }} }}({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}) }} }} |{{{1}}} }}{{documentation}}

<onlyinclude><!--

< -- TEST IF DATE IS CORRUPT OR OUT OF RANGE -- >
-->{{#iferror: {{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} {{#iferror:{{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} 1999}}||*ERROR*}} 
 |{{{1|}}}
 |{{#ifeq: {{{3|}}}|y
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
   | mdy            = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   | iso | ymd      = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]]
   | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   }}
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
    | mdy            = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} 
    | iso | ymd      = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }}
    | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }}
   }}
  }}  
}}</onlyinclude>
{{documentation}}

<onlyinclude><!--

< -- TEST IF DATE IS CORRUPT OR OUT OF RANGE -- >
-->{{#iferror: {{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} {{#iferror:{{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} 1999}}||*ERROR*}} }}
 |{{{1|}}}
 |{{#ifeq: {{{3|}}}|y
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
   | mdy            = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   | iso | ymd      = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]]
   | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   }}
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
    | mdy            = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} 
    | iso | ymd      = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }}
    | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }}
   }}
  }}  
}}</onlyinclude>
{{documentation}}

<onlyinclude><!--

< -- TEST IF DATE IS CORRUPT OR A FRAGMENT -- >
-->{{#ifeq:{{#time:Y_M_d|{{{1}}} 2037}} | {{#iferror: {{#time:Y_M_d|{{{1}}} }} | *ERROR* }}
 |{{#ifeq: {{{3|}}}|y
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
    | asis | none    = {{{1|}}}
    | mdy            = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
    | iso | ymd      = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]]
    | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   }}
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
    | asis | none    = {{{1|}}}
    | mdy            = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} 
    | iso | ymd      = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }}
    | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }}
   }}
  }}  
 |{{{1|}}}
}}</onlyinclude>
{{documentation}}

revision.comment: if no first parameter, use current date thanks to #time defaults
update after exhaustive development at [[User:Fullstop/Sandbox/T1]] and [[User:Happy-melon/sandbox1]]
revision.text:
<onlyinclude><!--
-->{{#switch:none
 |{{#iferror: {{#time:Y_M_d|{{{1|}}} }}|none}}
 |{{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}|none|asis=none}}
 |{{#ifexpr: {{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} }} < 1582|none}}<!--
--> = {{{1|}}}<!-- error or "none", so no formatting -->
 |<!-- continue with formatting -->
  {{#iferror: {{#expr:{{{1|dummy}}} }}
  |<!-- input is not just a solitary number -->
    {{#ifeq:{{#time:Y|{{{1|1 Jan 2000}}} 1996}}{{#time:Y|{{{1|1 Jan 2000}}} 2004}}|19962004
    |<!-- no year -->
      {{#ifeq:{{#time:d|{{{1|}}} 2036}}|{{#time:d|{{{1|}}} }}
      |<!-- month+day -->{{#time:
        {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
        | lmdy | liso | lymd      = [[:F j]]
        | mdy  | iso  | ymd       = F j
        | ldmy | l                = [[:j F]]
        | #default                = j F
        }}|{{{1|}}} 2000 }}<!-- default='dmy' or null or "" or unsupported option -->
      |<!-- month only -->{{#time:
        {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
        | lmdy | liso | lymd 
        | ldmy | l                = [[F]]
        | #default                = F
        }}|{{{1|}}} 2000 }}<!-- default='dmy'/'mdy'/'ymd'/'iso'/null/""/unsupported opt -->
      }}
    |<!-- with year-->
      {{#if: {{#iferror:{{#time:j|2 {{{1|}}}}}|*D*|{{#iferror:{{#time:j|2000 {{{1|}}}}}|*D*| }}}}
      |<!-- day+month+year -->{{#time:
        {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
        | lmdy                    = [[:F j]], [[Y]]
        | mdy                     = F j, Y
        | liso                    = [[Y|Y-]][[F j|m-d]]<!-- i.e. [[Y-m-d]] -->
        | iso                     = Y-m-d
        | lymd                    = [[Y]] [[:F j]]
        | ymd                     = Y F j
        | ldmy | l                = [[:j F]] [[Y]]
        | #default                = j F Y
        }}|{{{1|}}} }}<!-- #default='dmy' or null or "" or unsupported option -->
      |<!-- month+year -->{{#time:
        {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
        | lmdy | liso | lymd | ldmy | l  = [[:F Y]]
        | #default                = F Y
        }}|{{{1|}}} }}<!-- default='dmy'/'iso'/'mdy'/null/""/unsupported option -->
      }}
    }}
  |<!-- input is a solitary number. Treat it as just a year. -->
    {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
    | lmdy | liso | lymd 
    | ldmy | l                = [[{{#expr:{{{1|}}} }}]]
    | #default                = {{#expr:{{{1|}}} }}
    }}
  }}    
}}</onlyinclude>

revision.comment: improved method of excluding bad dates from 1000-1583 era
update to improve handling of pure-number inputs, per talk
TFM: Nominated For Merging, See [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion#Template:Today]]
add option lnone to link years, decades, centuries & days of the week see [[Wikipedia talk:Manual of Style/Dates and numbers#Delinking dates]]
Moved sandbox live to fix wrong output when substituted

{{<includeonly>{{{subst|}}}</includeonly>#time:j F Y}}<noinclude> ==Usage== {{tlx|date}} gives {{date}}, but this changes to tomorrow's date when you view it tomorrow, and so on.
{{tlsx|date|2=subst=subst:}} gives the date on which the template is used, and doesn't change.
[[Category:Date-computing templates based on current time|{{PAGENAME}}]] </noinclude>

DMY || MDY |- | {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2007-01-24}} || {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2007-01-24|y|mdy}} |- | {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2006-05-04|n}} || {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2006-05-04|n|mdy}} |- | {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2006-5-4|n}} || {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2006-5-4|n|mdy}} |- | {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2006-5-04|n}} || {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2006-5-04|n|mdy}} |- | {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2006-05-4|n}} || {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2006-05-4|n|mdy}} |- | {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|May 4th, 2006|n}} || {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|May 4th, 2006|n|mdy}} |} ===Date strings #time function doesn't interpretes returns only the string === {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|23007-031-24}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|1 December 2008}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|[[1 December]] [[2008]]}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|1 December 2006}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|[[1 December]] [[2006]]}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|24 June, 2006}} BUG {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|24 june 2006|n}} BUG ;outside the [[:meta:ParserFunctions#.23time:|#time]] functions limits {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|1901-12-13}}, {{#time:c|1901-12-13}} gives {{#time:c|1901-12-13}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|1901-12-14}}, {{#time:c|1901-12-14}} gives {{#time:c|1901-12-14}} (#time er riv ruskende gal, justert for i mal for alle disse tilfellene) {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|1970-01-01}}, {{#time:c|1970-01-01}} gives {{#time:c|1970-01-01}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|1970-01-02}} (riktig, første dato innenfor), {{#time:c|1970-01-02}} gives {{#time:c|1970-01-02}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2038-01-19}} (riktig, siste dato innenfor), {{#time:c|2038-01-19}} gives {{#time:c|2038-01-19}} {{evd|ISOtodmymdy|2038-01-20}}, {{#time:c|2038-01-20}} gives {{#time:c|2038-01-20}} [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:ISO date templates]] [[no:Mal:ISOtilNorskdato]]

revision.comment: moved [[Template:ISOtodmymdy]] to [[Template:ISOtoMOS]]: Converts from ISO to Manual of style
adds parsings of two MOS formats so its possible to write this as input
Defaults to not wikilinked. Needs to give the parameter 2 as y to get it wikilinked. Per MOS dates should not be wikilinked in most cases
Change the order, Wikilinked will normaly not be used so it should be the last parameter
why wouldn't we want it to accept all the date formats it can handle?
this was from the Norwegian version... any guesses??
restore ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:F j, Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:j F Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}}). It shouldnt be allowed to give dates outside MOS. Restored bday, See H-card
revision.text: {{#if: ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:F j, Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:j F Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}}) | {{#iferror:{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }} |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{#time:U|{{{1}}} }} | 0 |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{{3| }}}|y |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] | ymd | iso = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]] | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] }} |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} | ymd | iso = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }} | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }} }} }} }} }}({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}) |{{{1}}} }}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Only return hcard if valid date
revision.text: {{#if: ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:F j, Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:j F Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}}) | {{#iferror:{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }} |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{#time:U|{{{1}}} }} | 0 |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{{3| }}}|y |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] | ymd | iso = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]] | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] }} |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} | ymd | iso = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }} | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }} }} }}({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}) }} }} |{{{1}}} }}{{documentation}}

<onlyinclude><!--

< -- TEST IF DATE IS CORRUPT OR OUT OF RANGE -- >
-->{{#iferror: {{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} {{#iferror:{{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} 1999}}||*ERROR*}} 
 |{{{1|}}}
 |{{#ifeq: {{{3|}}}|y
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
   | mdy            = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   | iso | ymd      = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]]
   | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   }}
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
    | mdy            = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} 
    | iso | ymd      = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }}
    | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }}
   }}
  }}  
}}</onlyinclude>
{{documentation}}

<onlyinclude><!--

< -- TEST IF DATE IS CORRUPT OR OUT OF RANGE -- >
-->{{#iferror: {{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} {{#iferror:{{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} 1999}}||*ERROR*}} }}
 |{{{1|}}}
 |{{#ifeq: {{{3|}}}|y
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
   | mdy            = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   | iso | ymd      = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]]
   | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   }}
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
    | mdy            = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} 
    | iso | ymd      = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }}
    | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }}
   }}
  }}  
}}</onlyinclude>
{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Happy-melon|Happy-melon]] ([[User talk:Happy-melon|talk]]) to last version by Nsaa
revision.text: {{#if: ({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:F j, Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}} or {{#time:j F Y|{{{1}}}}}={{{1}}}) | {{#iferror:{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }} |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{#time:U|{{{1}}} }} | 0 |{{{1|}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{{3| }}}|y |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] | ymd | iso = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]] | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] }} |{{#switch: {{{2| }}} | mdy = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} | ymd | iso = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }} | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }} }} }}({{#time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}}}}) }} }} |{{{1}}} }}{{documentation}}

<onlyinclude><!--

< -- TEST IF DATE IS CORRUPT OR A FRAGMENT -- >
-->{{#ifeq:{{#time:Y_M_d|{{{1}}} 2037}} | {{#iferror: {{#time:Y_M_d|{{{1}}} }} | *ERROR* }}
 |{{#ifeq: {{{3|}}}|y
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
    | asis | none    = {{{1|}}}
    | mdy            = [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}]], [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
    | iso | ymd      = [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:F j|{{{1}}} }}|{{ #time:m-d|{{{1}}} }}]]
    | dmy | #default = [[{{ #time:j F|{{{1}}} }}]] [[{{ #time:Y|{{{1}}} }}]]
   }}
  |{{#switch: {{{2|}}}
    | asis | none    = {{{1|}}}
    | mdy            = {{ #time:F j, Y|{{{1}}} }} 
    | iso | ymd      = {{ #time:Y-m-d|{{{1}}} }}
    | dmy | #default = {{ #time:j F Y|{{{1}}} }}
   }}
  }}  
 |{{{1|}}}
}}</onlyinclude>
{{documentation}}

revision.comment: if no first parameter, use current date thanks to #time defaults
update after exhaustive development at [[User:Fullstop/Sandbox/T1]] and [[User:Happy-melon/sandbox1]]
revision.text:
<onlyinclude><!--
-->{{#switch:none
 |{{#iferror: {{#time:Y_M_d|{{{1|}}} }}|none}}
 |{{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}|none|asis=none}}
 |{{#ifexpr: {{#time:Y|{{{1|}}} }} < 1582|none}}<!--
--> = {{{1|}}}<!-- error or "none", so no formatting -->
 |<!-- continue with formatting -->
  {{#iferror: {{#expr:{{{1|dummy}}} }}
  |<!-- input is not just a solitary number -->
    {{#ifeq:{{#time:Y|{{{1|1 Jan 2000}}} 1996}}{{#time:Y|{{{1|1 Jan 2000}}} 2004}}|19962004
    |<!-- no year -->
      {{#ifeq:{{#time:d|{{{1|}}} 2036}}|{{#time:d|{{{1|}}} }}
      |<!-- month+day -->{{#time:
        {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
        | lmdy | liso | lymd      = [[:F j]]
        | mdy  | iso  | ymd       = F j
        | ldmy | l                = [[:j F]]
        | #default                = j F
        }}|{{{1|}}} 2000 }}<!-- default='dmy' or null or "" or unsupported option -->
      |<!-- month only -->{{#time:
        {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
        | lmdy | liso | lymd 
        | ldmy | l                = [[F]]
        | #default                = F
        }}|{{{1|}}} 2000 }}<!-- default='dmy'/'mdy'/'ymd'/'iso'/null/""/unsupported opt -->
      }}
    |<!-- with year-->
      {{#if: {{#iferror:{{#time:j|2 {{{1|}}}}}|*D*|{{#iferror:{{#time:j|2000 {{{1|}}}}}|*D*| }}}}
      |<!-- day+month+year -->{{#time:
        {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
        | lmdy                    = [[:F j]], [[Y]]
        | mdy                     = F j, Y
        | liso                    = [[Y|Y-]][[F j|m-d]]<!-- i.e. [[Y-m-d]] -->
        | iso                     = Y-m-d
        | lymd                    = [[Y]] [[:F j]]
        | ymd                     = Y F j
        | ldmy | l                = [[:j F]] [[Y]]
        | #default                = j F Y
        }}|{{{1|}}} }}<!-- #default='dmy' or null or "" or unsupported option -->
      |<!-- month+year -->{{#time:
        {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
        | lmdy | liso | lymd | ldmy | l  = [[:F Y]]
        | #default                = F Y
        }}|{{{1|}}} }}<!-- default='dmy'/'iso'/'mdy'/null/""/unsupported option -->
      }}
    }}
  |<!-- input is a solitary number. Treat it as just a year. -->
    {{#switch: {{lc: {{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
    | lmdy | liso | lymd 
    | ldmy | l                = [[{{#expr:{{{1|}}} }}]]
    | #default                = {{#expr:{{{1|}}} }}
    }}
  }}    
}}</onlyinclude>

revision.comment: +offset functionality per talk req, and +show target fmt
revision.text: <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>empty template|{{error:not substituted|}}}}</includeonly><includeonly>{</includeonly><includeonly>{</includeonly><includeonly>date</includeonly><includeonly>|{{</includeonly><includeonly>subst:</includeonly><includeonly>#time:j F Y|{{</includeonly><includeonly>subst:</includeonly><includeonly>#iferror:{{</includeonly><includeonly>subst:</includeonly><includeonly>#time:Y|{{{1|*error*}}}}}||{{{1|}}} }}</includeonly><includeonly>}}</includeonly><noinclude><!--datefmt begin--></noinclude><includeonly>|{{</includeonly><includeonly>subst:</includeonly><includeonly>#switch:</includeonly><includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>lc:</includeonly><includeonly>{{{</includeonly><includeonly>2|</includeonly><includeonly>}}}}}|none|asis|mdy|lmdy|ymd|lymd|iso|liso|ldmy=</includeonly><includeonly><includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>lc:</includeonly><includeonly>{{{</includeonly><includeonly>2|</includeonly><includeonly>}}}}}|dmy|#default=dmy</includeonly><includeonly>}}</includeonly><noinclude><!--datefmt end--></noinclude><includeonly>}}</includeonly><noinclude> <!-- This template must be SUBSTITUTED --> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add cats and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: improved method of excluding bad dates from 1000-1583 era
update to improve handling of pure-number inputs, per talk
TFM: Nominated For Merging, See [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion#Template:Today]]
add option lnone to link years, decades, centuries & days of the week see [[Wikipedia talk:Manual of Style/Dates and numbers#Delinking dates]]
Moved sandbox live to fix wrong output when substituted
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Date for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:none
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#iferror: {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#time:Y_M_d|{{{1|}}} }} | none }} <noinclude><!-- #time: can't handle --></noinclude>
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#iferror: {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr: {{{1|}}}+0 }}
    |<noinclude><!--not a pure number--></noinclude>
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr: {{{1|}}}+0 > 10000000000000
       |<noinclude><!-- a yyyymmddhhmmss sss --></noinclude>
       |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifeq: {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:{{{1|}}}+0}} | {{{1|}}}
          | none <noinclude><!-- pure number eg 123.456 --></noinclude>
          | <noinclude><!-- assume yy-mm-dd --></noinclude>
        }}
     }}
  }}
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:  {{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc:{{{2|}}}}} | none | asis | link | lnone =none }}
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:  {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#time:Y|{{{1|}}} }} < 1000 | none }}
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:  {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#time:Ynj|{{{1|}}} }}|100031|110031|130031|140031|150031=none}}
 |= {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}
      |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:{{{2}}}
         |link|lnone|l=[[{{{1}}}]]
         |{{{1}}}
       }}
    }}<noinclude><!-- error or "none", so no formatting --></noinclude>
 |<noinclude><!-- continue with formatting --></noinclude>
  {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifeq:<noinclude><!--
    --></noinclude>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#time:Y|{{{1}}} 2008}}<noinclude><!--
    --></noinclude>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#iferror: {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr: {{{1}}}>10000000000000 | no }} | }}<noinclude><!--
    --></noinclude>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#time:Y|{{{1}}} 2004}}
  |20082004
  |<noinclude><!-- no year --></noinclude>
    {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifeq:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#time:d|{{{1}}} 2036}}|{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#time:d|{{{1}}} }}
    |<noinclude><!-- month+day --></noinclude>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#time:
      {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch: {{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc: {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
      | lmdy | liso | lymd      = [[:F j]]
      | mdy  | iso  | ymd       = F j
      | ldmy | l                = [[:j F]]
      | #default                = j F
      }}|{{{1}}} 2000 }}<noinclude><!-- default='dmy' or null or "" or unsupported option --></noinclude>
    |<noinclude><!-- month only --></noinclude>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#time:
      {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch: {{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc: {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
      | lmdy | liso | lymd 
      | ldmy | l                = [[F]]
      | #default                = F
      }}|{{{1}}} 2000 }}<noinclude><!-- default='dmy'/'mdy'/'ymd'/'iso'/null/""/unsupported opt --></noinclude>
    }}
  |<noinclude><!-- with year--></noinclude>
    {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if: {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#iferror:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#time:j|2 {{{1|}}}}}|*D*|{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#iferror:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#time:j|2000 {{{1|}}}}}|*D*| }}}}
    |<noinclude><!-- day+month+year --></noinclude>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#time:
      {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch: {{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc: {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
      | lmdy                    = [[:F j]], [[Y]]
      | mdy                     = F j, Y
      | liso                    = [[Y|Y-]][[F j|m-d]]<noinclude><!-- i.e. [[Y-m-d]] --></noinclude>
      | iso                     = Y-m-d
      | lymd                    = [[Y]] [[:F j]]
      | ymd                     = Y F j
      | ldmy | l                = [[:j F]] [[Y]]
      | #default                = j F Y
      }}|{{{1|}}} }}<noinclude><!-- #default='dmy' or null or "" or unsupported option --></noinclude>
    |<noinclude><!-- month+year --></noinclude>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#time:
      {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch: {{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc: {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
      | lmdy | liso | lymd | ldmy | l  = [[:F Y]]
      | #default                = F Y
      }}|{{{1|}}} }}<noinclude><!-- default='dmy'/'iso'/'mdy'/null/""/unsupported option --></noinclude>
    }}
  }}    
}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

  |<noinclude></noinclude>
    {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifeq:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#time:d|{{{1}}} 2036}}|{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#time:d|{{{1}}} }}

      | ldmy | l                = [[:j F]]
      | #default                = j F
      }}|{{{1}}} 2000 }}<noinclude></noinclude>
    |<noinclude></noinclude>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#time:
      {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch: {{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc: {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
      | lmdy | liso | lymd 
      | ldmy | l                = [[F]]
      | #default                = F
      }}|{{{1}}} 2000 }}<noinclude></noinclude>
    }}
  |<noinclude></noinclude>
    {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if: {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#iferror:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#time:j|2 {{{1|}}}}}|*D*|{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#iferror:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#time:j|2000 {{{1|}}}}}|*D*| }}}}
    |<noinclude></noinclude>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#time:
      {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch: {{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc: {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
      | lmdy                    = [[:F j]], [[Y]]
      | mdy                     = F j, Y
      | liso                    = [[Y|Y-]][[F j|m-d]]<noinclude></noinclude>
      | iso                     = Y-m-d
      | lymd                    = [[Y]] [[:F j]]
      | ymd                     = Y F j
      | ldmy | l                = [[:j F]] [[Y]]
      | #default                = j F Y
      }}|{{{1|}}} }}<noinclude></noinclude>
    |<noinclude></noinclude>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#time:
      {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch: {{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc: {{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|y|L}}{{{2|}}} }}
      | lmdy | liso | lymd | ldmy | l  = [[:F Y]]
      | #default                = F Y
      }}|{{{1|}}} }}<noinclude></noinclude>
    }}
  }}    
}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>
